title: Union Day'26
description: Union Day and Ethnic Day were celebrated with vibrant cultural performances, traditional attire, music, dance, and enthusiastic student participation. The celebrations concluded with an exciting pro show, making it a memorable occasion for the entire campus community.

title: Women's Day
description: To honor the spirit of women in leadership, we are proud to host Ms. Anjana B, who achieved Rank 222 in the Civil Services Examination.

title: Holi
